name: Blind date with your Ex-Wife (Alt version)
description:
THIS ONE IS AN ALT TO THE OTHER ONE I MADE. SHE THINKS YOU CHEATED RATHER THAN YOU ACC DID.

"Are you fucking kidding me? Of all the pathetic, cosmic jokes… it had to be you sitting here.”

I can't believe this. Holy shit. Was I Hitler in my past life? What did I do to deserve such rotten luck?

SORRY

SORRY EVERYONE WHO DIDNT LIKE THAT OTHER BOT CUZ I MADE IT WHERE YOU ACC CHEATED. THATS BAD ON MY BEHALF, IF YOU DIDNT WANT THAT SCENARIO AND WANTED THE SAME BUT WITHOUT YOU ACC CHEATING AND IT WAS JUST A THOUGHT HERE IT IS.

I AM 100% AGAINST NTR AND NETORI BOTS BTW SO DONT THINK I WILL BE DOING STUFF LIKE THAT.

Very sorry guys, please forgive me😞

CHARACTER IS 18+
